LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF YOVANNA PECK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT ON THE ISSUE OF DUTY AS TO WHETHER PLAINTIFF WAS AN INVOLUNTARY BAILEE AND/OR HAD THE RIGHT TO POSSESS THE DOG. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF ON CLAIM OF GROSS NEGLIGENCE CLAIMS BY FAILING TO PROVIDE ANY EVIDENCE OF DAMAGES. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT 3.1350(B) AND AS A CONSEQUENCE, MAY NOT CHALLENGE DEFENDANT'S AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
